level_signals: 4+ years of experience in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Business Operations, or Customer Operations
Reports to VP of Revenue Operations
Salary range $130K–$140K USD, consistent with mid-senior IC
Owns end-to-end operational frameworks and cross-functional partnerships without stated direct reports

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of experience in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Business Operations, or Customer Operations within a SaaS, professional services, or solutions delivery environment.
Proven ability to design and implement cross-functional processes that drive measurable business outcomes.
Strong command of Salesforce or comparable customer management platforms, including reporting, workflow design, and data modeling.
Experience with capacity planning, forecasting, or resource modeling that connects demand signals to operational capacity.
An analytical mindset with the ability to translate data into insight—and insight into action.
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to document complex processes and influence senior stakeholders.
Comfort operating in ambiguity and a bias toward building structure where it doesn't yet exist.
Experience with project management tools (e.g., Asana, Teamwork) and BI or reporting tools (e.g., Tableau, Looker, Domo, or similar)

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Understanding of services delivery, agency operations, or delivery-based business models; experience in the creator economy or marketing industry is a plus.

scope.surface: Revenue Operations supporting brand customers across Influence Platform, Managed Services, and Mavely; Sales-to-Services handoff, campaign health, capacity forecasting, and Salesforce data architecture
scope.business_model: SaaS + managed services (influencer marketing platform and services for enterprise brands)
primary_metrics_inferred: Campaign delivery efficiency and margin performance
Customer health scores across product lines
Budget utilization and delivery risk signals
core_responsibilities: Define and own operational frameworks for efficient delivery of sold revenue across all brand customer offerings
Own metrics and reporting for campaign health, budget utilization, margin performance, and delivery risk
Build and maintain pipeline-to-capacity forecasting models with 30–60–90 day visibility
Design, document, and improve workflows from sale through delivery completion
Define SLAs, efficiency benchmarks, and operational standards
Own Salesforce data architecture and ensure data integrity across customer and campaign lifecycle
Build load-balancing frameworks for Services leadership
Create documentation and enablement resources for teams
Facilitate alignment and operating rhythms across cross-functional stakeholders

green_flags: Clear reporting line to VP of Revenue Operations
Well-scoped success criteria defined for 6–12 months
High-visibility, cross-functional role with direct impact on revenue delivery
Explicit openness to remote candidates for select positions
Detailed role responsibilities reduce ambiguity about day-to-day work
red_flags: Visa sponsorship and work authorization policy not stated
Remote eligibility described vaguely ('for select positions') — unclear if this role qualifies
No equity mentioned in compensation package
Role spans Influence Platform, Managed Services, and Mavely — potentially very broad scope for one manager-level hire
Salary range is relatively narrow ($10K band), which may leave little room for negotiation

scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not enumerated in JD as explicit KPIs)
